raw_text: {"intent":"Extract atomic preference facts from the table.","decision":"Commit two durable preference memory cards.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"preference","statement":"Sam prefers Bill Evans.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person"},{"name":"Bill Evans","type":"person","role":"preferred artist"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"prefers","object":"Bill Evans"}]},{"kind":"preference","statement":"Daniele prefers knowledge graphs.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Daniele","type":"person"},{"name":"knowledge graphs","type":"concept","role":"preferred topic"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Daniele","predicate":"prefers","object":"knowledge graphs"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"No ambiguity or known entity merge is required from the input."},"conflict_classification":"none","answer":"Extracted 2 preference facts.","citations":["| Sam | Bill Evans |","| Daniele | Knowledge graphs |"],"repair_options":[],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Parsed two rows from the table.","Created two atomic preference statements."]}}
